detail: Frontmatter identifies this card as 'The Horned King - Wicked Ruler' (Whispers in the Well) but the cached reference image at the promo3 URL clearly depicts 'Scrooge McDuck - S.H.U.S.H. Agent' — a completely different character and card. The image shows an anthropomorphic duck in a brown trench coat and bowler hat holding an umbrella over an open-water coastline. The card title bar in the image reads 'SCROOGE MCDUCK'. This is a prep-time image-URL mismatch: the reference_image_source_url points to a promo3 path that retrieved the wrong card's art. Do NOT enrich this card until the correct image is fetched. Curator action required: re-run researchbot --prepare-only for this card, verify reference_image_source_url resolves to The Horned King art, re-queue for vision.
